dailySummary.top_activities: working on SelfTrack (4h 0m) · playing Total War (30m) · taking a bath (notepad note left on screen) (30m)
dailySummary.insight: 4h on SelfTrack tooling but only 15m on MBTI Oracle and 0 TikTok shipped — zero motion on the actual revenue/acquisition levers. Tomorrow morning: film one Simple Rizz hook before opening the dashboard repo.
dailySummary.note_from_sun:
I made a new website today, which is this one. I called it self-track initially but changed it to Life of Sun.
I'm trying to figure out how I can better optimize my time for max ROI. 
I was inspired by Mark Andreessen on a podcast. He had a similar setup to track his sleep.
I hope this system gives me insight into how I can better spend my time.

dailySummary.top_activities: haircut errand (10h 30m) · sleeping (7h 15m) · away from desk (1h 45m)
dailySummary.insight:
• 0 minutes on MBTI Oracle, 0 TikTok hooks, 0 SelfTrack ships — the revenue levers didn't move
• Left at 13:22 for a haircut and the desk sat idle until midnight — that's 10h of dead clock
• Set a hard return cutoff next time: if Sun's not back by 19:00, the day is the signal — pivot to mobile work
